title: Businessman nabbed with1,400 litres of diesel
body_lines: A businessman was arrested today in Makumbura, Kottawa for hoarding 1,400 litres of diesel illegally, the Western Province (South) Crimes Division said.
They said a 500lt tank was found in the upstairs of the businessman's house and another similat tank and two barrels of diesel were found in his business premises.
The suspect is to be produced before the Homagama Magistrate today.
